name: brightedgeassesment
description: Web crawler as a GCP Cloud Function

scripts.dev: gcloud functions deploy crawlFunction --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --source . --entry-point crawlFunction --quiet
scripts.deploy: gcloud functions deploy crawlFunction --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --source . --entry-point crawlFunction
